source_documents.role: product, audience, governance and quality requirements

identification_basis: operating-system account and project path ahmad-abdullayev
supplied specifications define a single represented website owner

deployment.www_behavior: 308 redirect to the primary origin while preserving path and query
deployment.regional_data_policy: Before deployment, regional application resources and durable customer content for production, staging, preview, backups, logs, queues and SES delivery events must be configured in eu-central-1; application-managed cross-region replication is prohibited unless separately approved. Outbound email necessarily traverses recipient mail systems, and every global, edge or out-of-region service path must be separately inventoried, assessed and disclosed.
deployment.cross_border_consequence: The selected design would process some hosting and contact-delivery data in Germany when deployed. Production release therefore requires a service- and recipient-path inventory, the actual controller and data-subject nexus determination, the applicable-law assessment, an accurate privacy notice, processor terms and any transfer mechanism that the resulting assessment requires.

environments.data_policy: Synthetic or explicitly sanitized development data only; no production secrets or contact submissions.
Deterministic synthetic fixtures only; the environment and its database are disposable.
Ephemeral sanitized review data only; no production database, secrets, analytics or contact delivery.
Production-shaped synthetic or irreversibly sanitized data in eu-central-1; delivery providers use sandbox or sink destinations.
Approved public snapshots are public; drafts, administration, inquiries, security state and private assets remain access-controlled in eu-central-1.

localization.fallback_policy: No silent cross-language fallback is needed while English is the only active locale; text in another language retains an element-level BCP 47 language tag.
localization.additional_locale_activation_condition: A complete owner-approved translation inventory, independent review workflow, equivalent-route map and localized metadata set must exist before another locale is activated.

administration.model: single-owner online administration with named non-shared accounts and operation-level authorization
administration.recovery_policy: Single-use, expiring recovery through a separately verified owner-controlled channel; recovery invalidates existing sessions and emits an audit event.

contact.privacy_acknowledgement_semantics: Confirms that the collection notice was presented and acknowledged only; it is not a legal basis and never substitutes for a separately required consent channel.
contact.acceptance_point: A normalized inquiry and retention deadline are durably stored and one idempotent delivery job is durably queued; the response says accepted for processing and never claims delivery.
contact.failure_policy: Validation preserves valid input; abuse is rate-limited accessibly; provider failure is retried and recorded without a false delivery-success response.

orcid.reason: No owner-verified ORCID iD or owner-approved import scope is present.
orcid.activation_condition: The owner verifies the exact ORCID iD, approves public fields and provenance rules, and provider-contract tests pass.

crossref.reason: No owner-approved DOI-bearing publication inventory is present.
crossref.activation_condition: At least one owner-approved normalized DOI exists and mapping, cache, retry, provenance, duplicate and conflict tests pass.

conditional_requirements.title: Optional pronouns and pronunciation
conditional_requirements.rationale: No owner-approved pronoun, phonetic spelling or pronunciation asset exists, and none may be inferred.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: The owner supplies and content-approves the exact public value or accessible pronunciation asset.

conditional_requirements.title: Media and event biography kit
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved biography variants, headshots, speaking topics or usage terms exist.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A rights-cleared, accessible, owner-approved media-kit inventory and usage policy exist.

conditional_requirements.title: Funding relationship
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved research funding, sponsor or grant relationship has been supplied.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: An evidence-backed public research record has an approved funder, sponsor or grant relationship.

conditional_requirements.title: Ethics, limitations, and responsible use
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved research record currently triggers a public ethics, limitation or responsible-use statement.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A research record requires such context and the statement is approved with its evidence and access limits.

conditional_requirements.title: Contributor role attribution
conditional_requirements.rationale: No publication with owner-approved controlled contributor-role data is present.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A publication has evidence-backed contributor roles that preserve authorship and author order.

conditional_requirements.title: Equal and corresponding author indicators
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved equal-contribution or corresponding-author assertion is present.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Publisher or author-approved evidence establishes the exact indicator for a publication.

conditional_requirements.title: Correction notice
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved publication correction event is present.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A publication has a verified correction, erratum or material update requiring a dated public notice.

conditional_requirements.title: Open-access resource
conditional_requirements.rationale: No owner-approved lawful open-access destination has been inventoried.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A publication has a verified lawful open-access URL and an accurate access-state label.

conditional_requirements.title: Local document distribution
conditional_requirements.rationale: No rights-cleared local publication file has been approved.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Rights, licence, version, accessibility and owner approval are recorded for a distributable file.

conditional_requirements.title: Related code and software
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved publication-to-software relationship exists.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A canonical publication links to an approved versioned software record or repository release.

conditional_requirements.title: Related dataset and supplement
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved publication-to-dataset or supplement relationship exists.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A canonical publication links to an approved dataset or supplement with access, licence and identifier state.

conditional_requirements.title: Related presentations and media
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved publication-to-presentation or media relationship exists.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A publication and a rights-cleared presentation or media record have an approved canonical relationship.

conditional_requirements.title: RIS and other citation export
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved publication inventory or demonstrated need justifies an additional export format at launch.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Approved publication records exist and a named export format has a tested lossless field mapping and media type.

conditional_requirements.title: Metric provenance
conditional_requirements.rationale: No external publication metrics are approved, and site analytics are inactive.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A metric, provider, retrieval date, scope, limitations, cache and failure-isolation policy receive content and privacy approval.

conditional_requirements.title: Team and institution attribution
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved project team or institution attribution has been supplied.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A project has evidence-backed public collaborators or institutions and approved attribution wording.

conditional_requirements.title: Repository and demonstration links
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved project repository or live demonstration destination exists.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A project has a verified public repository or safe maintained demonstration URL with accurate status.

conditional_requirements.title: Software output metadata
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved software output record is present.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: An approved project produces software with canonical version, licence, repository, contribution and release metadata.

conditional_requirements.title: Dataset output metadata
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved dataset output record is present.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: An approved project produces a dataset with identifier, version, licence, access, documentation and stewardship metadata.

conditional_requirements.title: Thesis and supervision metadata
conditional_requirements.rationale: No owner-approved thesis or supervision record has been supplied.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: An education record has verified thesis title, institution, degree state and public supervision data.

conditional_requirements.title: Visiting and fellowship distinction
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved visiting appointment or fellowship record has been supplied.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A verified appointment is specifically visiting or a fellowship and its dates and institution are public.

conditional_requirements.title: Teaching profile
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved public teaching profile is present.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: The owner supplies verified teaching scope, role, institution, dates and intended public audience.

conditional_requirements.title: Course records
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved public course record is present.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A verified course and owner role are approved, with restricted student and teaching material excluded.

conditional_requirements.title: Mentoring and supervision
conditional_requirements.rationale: No consented public mentoring or supervision record is present.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: The relationship, role, dates, privacy basis and any named person's consent are recorded and approved.

conditional_requirements.title: Award and honour records
conditional_requirements.rationale: No evidence-backed award or honour record is present.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: An award has verified name, granting body, date, scope and public evidence.

conditional_requirements.title: Grant and funding records
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved grant or funding record is present.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A verified grant has public funder, identifier, role, dates, amount-disclosure decision and related research links.

conditional_requirements.title: Talk and presentation records
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved public talk or presentation record is present.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A verified talk has title, event, role, date, status and approved public destination or resources.

conditional_requirements.title: Presentation state and resources
conditional_requirements.rationale: No presentation resource or event state is present.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: An approved talk record has an upcoming or completed state and rights-cleared slides, video, transcript or related output.

conditional_requirements.title: Academic service records
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved public academic service record is present.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A verified service role is public and disclosure does not expose confidential review, committee or personal information.

conditional_requirements.title: Public scholarship articles
conditional_requirements.rationale: The launch inventory contains no approved long-form public scholarship article.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: At least one owner-authored, reviewed, rights-cleared article with correction and revision policy is approved.

conditional_requirements.title: Technical content support
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved content currently requires code, mathematics, citations, tables or figures beyond the core renderer.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Approved content requires a named technical construct and its semantic, accessible, secure renderer is tested.

conditional_requirements.title: Media appearance records
conditional_requirements.rationale: No verified and approved media appearance is present.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A media appearance has verified outlet, title, date, role, canonical link and rights/privacy review.

conditional_requirements.title: Feed and social metadata
conditional_requirements.rationale: Atom syndication and static page-specific social previews are selected discovery outputs and introduce no visitor tracking.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Active now; only approved public snapshots may generate /feed.atom or social metadata.

conditional_requirements.title: Multiple public variants
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved CV, resume, short biography, publication-list or language-specific document variants exist.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Two or more rights-cleared accessible variants have explicit audience, language, version and current/archival labels.

conditional_requirements.title: Optional contact form
conditional_requirements.rationale: A data-minimized form is the selected public contact route so the owner's email address is not published.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Active for production after SES domain verification, privacy text, retention, abuse, idempotency, accessibility and delivery-failure tests pass.

conditional_requirements.title: ORCID public-record retrieval
conditional_requirements.rationale: No owner-verified ORCID iD or approved import field set is present.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: The owner verifies the ORCID iD and public fields, credentials, provenance, cache, retry, duplicate and conflict tests pass.

conditional_requirements.title: Crossref DOI metadata retrieval
conditional_requirements.rationale: No owner-approved DOI-bearing publication record is present.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: An approved normalized DOI exists and Crossref mapping, etiquette, cache, retry, provenance, duplicate and conflict tests pass.

conditional_requirements.title: Captions and transcripts
conditional_requirements.rationale: No approved time-based media is published and third-party embeds are inactive.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Any published prerecorded or live time-based media has the applicable synchronized captions, transcript and alternatives approved before release.

conditional_requirements.title: Multilingual page variants
conditional_requirements.rationale: English is the only active locale and no complete approved translation inventory exists.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A second locale has independent draft, review, approval, publication and staleness ownership for a complete route set.

conditional_requirements.title: Equivalent language switching
conditional_requirements.rationale: A language selector would be an empty or misleading control with only English active.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A second approved locale and explicit equivalent-route map exist; missing translations use a labelled absence state.

conditional_requirements.title: Localized metadata and alternates
conditional_requirements.rationale: No alternate language route exists, so hreflang or localized social/structured metadata would be false.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Equivalent approved pages have localized titles, descriptions, canonical URLs, social metadata and reciprocal alternate links.

conditional_requirements.title: Directionality and mixed-language support
conditional_requirements.rationale: The sole active locale is left-to-right English; element-level language tagging remains a core content rule.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Approved mixed-direction or right-to-left content exists and bidi isolation, direction, font and assistive-technology tests pass.

conditional_requirements.title: Media and document management
conditional_requirements.rationale: The selected full editorial backend requires controlled CV, document, image and accessible-derivative workflows.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Active; every upload remains quarantined until allow-list, malware, metadata, rights, accessibility and approval checks pass.

conditional_requirements.title: Scheduled publication and expiration
conditional_requirements.rationale: Scheduled and expiring time-sensitive content is selected in the full backend profile and avoids error-prone manual release timing.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Active with UTC storage, explicit editorial timezone, validated state transitions, idempotent jobs and preservation of the last public snapshot.

conditional_requirements.title: Audit trail
conditional_requirements.rationale: Online privileged administration, contact delivery, feature configuration and publication require attributable security and integrity evidence even with one initial account.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Active for significant authentication, authorization, publication, integration, configuration, upload and release events.

conditional_requirements.title: Build and release status
conditional_requirements.rationale: Preview, staging and production promotion require visible validation, deployment, health and rollback state.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Active; immutable release identifiers and truthful terminal states are available to owner and administrator roles.

conditional_requirements.title: Administrative authentication
conditional_requirements.rationale: The selected online administration interface creates an authentication boundary.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Active for every administrative route and API; anonymous access is denied before protected state is read or changed.

conditional_requirements.title: Role-based least privilege
conditional_requirements.rationale: Owner, administrator and editor roles are selected and must remain separable even though only the owner is initially assigned.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Active with deny-by-default operation permissions and no shared accounts or implicit role inheritance.

conditional_requirements.title: Secure session lifecycle
conditional_requirements.rationale: Cookie-authenticated online administration requires bounded, revocable sessions.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Active with secure HttpOnly SameSite cookies, CSRF protection, idle and absolute expiry, logout and credential/role-change invalidation.

conditional_requirements.title: Account recovery and MFA
conditional_requirements.rationale: Password-based privileged administration is selected, so recoverability and phishing-resistant second-factor protection are required for all maintainer roles.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Active before any maintainer receives production access; recovery is single-use, expiring, audited and invalidates existing sessions.

conditional_requirements.title: Secure upload handling
conditional_requirements.rationale: Media and document management is active and therefore activates the complete upload trust boundary.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Active with size/type allow-lists, quarantine, content inspection, non-executable storage, immutable identity and explicit approval before publication.

conditional_requirements.title: Optional analytics activation
conditional_requirements.rationale: Launch decisions do not require visitor measurement and avoid collecting behavioral or device data without a demonstrated purpose.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A measurement question, minimal event schema, legal basis, notice, retention, access, deletion and provider assessment receive privacy and owner approval.

conditional_requirements.title: Privacy preference control
conditional_requirements.rationale: No public analytics, nonessential cookies, persistent preferences or third-party embeds are active, so a consent banner would be purposeless.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A separately approved public optional storage or embed purpose requires visitor choice; reject remains as usable as accept and withdrawal is available.

conditional_requirements.title: Third-party embed privacy
conditional_requirements.rationale: Third-party embeds are prohibited at launch; approved thumbnails, transcripts and direct links avoid involuntary provider requests.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: A specific provider and embed receive content, accessibility, security and privacy approval with click-to-activate control and a complete non-embedded alternative.

conditional_requirements.title: Loading and retry states
conditional_requirements.rationale: Active contact, search, upload, scheduling and release workflows contain asynchronous or failure-prone operations requiring truthful progress and retry behavior.
conditional_requirements.activation_condition: Active for every non-instant operation; status is accessible, retries are bounded and idempotent, and failure never removes canonical public content.

criteria_in_order: explicit prominence in the SRS purpose and homepage requirements
task criticality to truthful identification and evidence assessment
risk if the task or owner outcome is not achieved
ranking_method.tie_break_rule: prefer the goal that enables the other goal; otherwise preserve the SRS purpose sequence
ranking_method.constraint_rule: truthfulness, accessibility, security, privacy and recoverability are not traded away by rank
ranking_method.validation_status: owner-directed foundation baseline; revisit with approved user research and privacy-governed analytics

primary.name: Academic peers and prospective collaborators
primary.definition: Researchers, engineers and prospective collaborators assessing research, methods, contributions, outputs, software and data.

primary.name: Academic evaluators and decision makers
primary.definition: Reviewers, funders, supervisors, panels and institutional evaluators requiring evidence-backed identity, roles, outputs and impact.

primary.name: Students and early-career researchers
primary.definition: Learners seeking understandable research, methods, resources, mentoring information and suitable contact routes.

secondary.name: Professional opportunity evaluators
secondary.definition: Recruiters, employers and clients assessing expertise, experience, projects, contributions and the current CV.

secondary.name: Event and communication intermediaries
secondary.definition: Event organizers and media representatives seeking accurate biography material, topics, approved assets and contact.

secondary.name: General public visitors
secondary.definition: Non-specialists seeking an understandable account of the owner, the work and its public significance.

secondary.name: Search, scholarly-discovery and citation systems
secondary.definition: Search engines, scholarly crawlers, citation tools and metadata services requiring stable truthful machine-readable records.

visitor_goals.statement: Understand the owner's current focus and value quickly.
Discover and evaluate research areas, methods, activities and evidence.
Find and assess scholarly outputs and their status.
Inspect projects and the owner's concrete contributions.
Retrieve approved, reusable documents and research resources.
Evaluate fit for collaboration, research and professional opportunities.
Use the appropriate contact route with clear privacy expectations.
Complete every applicable task inclusively across supported devices and access methods.

owner_goals.statement: Maintain one truthful, owner-controlled public identity.
Communicate current research and professional work accurately.
Make the work discoverable, understandable, citable and reusable.
Generate appropriate academic and professional opportunities.
Keep facts synchronized without conflicting manual copies.
Prevent private, restricted, embargoed, revoked or outdated information from becoming public.
Serve disabled, multilingual, mobile and non-specialist visitors effectively.
Preserve stable routes, correction history, provenance and long-term trust.
Operate a reproducible, secure, recoverable and maintainable website with low owner burden.
